title: TITLE 26LIQUORS-ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES
doc_html:
TITLE 26 LIQUORS-ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES

CHAPTER 1.  ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGE CONTROL LAW

PART I.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§1.  Title

This Chapter may be cited as "The Alcoholic Beverage Control Law."

Amended by Acts 1956, No. 36, §1; Acts 1987, No. 696, §1.
